title: Narrow ZOPA — R3 close
description: Mid-volume cotton order with a buyer cap just above the seller's R3-accept threshold (₹360). Both sides converge inside a tight zone of possible agreement. Expected to close at the buyer's last offer in round 3. Demonstrates a 'just-feasible' deal where the gap closes inside the math, not by anyone capitulating. Buyer opening is random ₹250–₹320 per existing code; the scenario shapes the closing window via maxBudgetPerUnit (the field that today's parser actually honors).

expectedOutcome.likely: 3-round close at ~₹373–₹385/unit. Total deal ~₹11.2–₹11.6M. ACTUS PAM simulation succeeds. Full PO → Invoice → DD → ACTUS chain runs.
expectedOutcome.possible: If Gemini gives the seller generous interpretation early, may close in round 2 around ₹385. Less likely.
expectedOutcome.failureMode: If Gemini rate-limits and the rule-fallback fires, seller's R2 counter may exceed ₹395 (capped at lastSellerOffer − concession). Buyer's R3 will then sit at the cap (₹395) and seller's R3 threshold (₹360) is still met → ACCEPT. Escalation is unlikely at this budget.

declaredButDeferred: sellerIntent (entirely — seller acts on its own .env config)
